title: Quilt Kotlin Libraries (QKL)
body:
# Quilt Kotlin Libraries
Quilt Kotlin Libraries is Quilt's official Kotlin wrappers for QSL and Minecraft. It also bundles the Kotlin StdLib, and some Kotlinx libraries. **You do not need Fabric Language Kotlin with Quilt Kotlin Libraries installed.**

**This project requires Quilt Loader!**

## The Quilt Project
The Quilt project is an open-source, community-driven modding toolchain designed primarily for Minecraft. By focusing on speed, ease of use and modularity, Quilt aims to provide a sleek and modern modding toolchain with an open ecosystem.

Learn more about Quilt on [our website](https://quiltmc.org/).
